caption: A news broadcast depicts a group of men in a formal indoor setting, seated on white sofas. The men are dressed in traditional Indian attire and western suits. In the initial frames, a man in a dark suit stands and points towards others, while several men sit and observe. The on-screen text at the top asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and the ticker at the bottom reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". Various names like "डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार" appear in red and white boxes beside the figures. As the sequence progresses, a news anchor appears in a circular inset on the left, and the top headline changes to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजसवी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", while the bottom ticker remains the same. A "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the upper right corner of the final frame.
